action_boundary: Should change CHG-501 execute under the approved site window?
communication_boundary: Convert timestamps using the stated facility timezone before judging the approval window.

documents.text: Change request REQ-CHG501 asks to execute CHG-501 at 19:30Z on 2026-07-03.
Approval window WIN-CHG501 authorizes CHG-501 from 14:00 to 16:00 ET on 2026-07-03.
Facility site note TZ-SITE-A states site A operates on ET and ET equals UTC-4 for this schedule date.
Change approval APP-CHG501 binds CHG-501, site A, and window WIN-CHG501.
Change execution requires the execution time to fall inside the approved local site window after timezone conversion.
